title: Add history pruning for hub and knowledge branches (gh#297)

comments.author: anon-295fd0bb
comments.content: Plan: Add crosslink prune command. 1) Add Prune subcommand to CLI in main.rs. 2) Create commands/prune.rs with hub and knowledge branch pruning. 3) Use git orphan branch rewrite (checkout --orphan, commit current tree, force-update branch). 4) Stale data cleanup for heartbeats/locks/events. 5) Flags: --dry-run, --keep-commits N, --hub-only, --knowledge-only, --force.

comments.author: anon-295fd0bb
comments.content: Decision: Implement as commands/prune.rs with a standalone git_in_dir() helper. Will use SyncManager::init_cache() and KnowledgeManager::init_cache() to ensure caches exist, then operate directly on the worktrees via git commands. Squash approach: git checkout --orphan, add all, commit, then update-ref the branch. Need to add remote() getter to KnowledgeManager.
